name: slides
description: A 6-skill pack for going from a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free .pptx deck. 5 user-invocable skills: teach-slides, narrative, build-deck, slop-check, revise.

interface.shortDescription: From a vague idea to a finished, on-brand, slop-free PowerPoint deck.
interface.longDescription: Six skills that work standalone or chained: teach-slides onboards you to presentation craft; narrative shapes a vague idea into a tight deck story; build-deck renders an on-brand .pptx; slop-check audits a deck for generic, AI-flavoured slop; revise changes a rendered deck by conversation — syncing its spec, reconciling hand-edits, and re-rendering through the same gates. presentation-craft is the shared knowledge base behind all of them.
